data.content: [Codex 2026-04-20] Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch knot-98e6-shutdown-opencode at commit d8c82704 against the investigation acceptance criteria. The change matches the proven failure mode: after turn_ended, Foolery now explicitly tears down persistent OpenCode HTTP servers instead of assuming stdin EOF will end them. Tests cover ready and not-ready shutdown behavior, plus runtime close-path disposal, and the recorded sanity gates for the artifact all passed.
